title: Inout signals within modules don't propogate correctly.

features.name: inout signal passed directly to child module input
features.description: Code should include an inout signal in a parent module that is passed directly as an input to a child module instantiation without using an intermediate wire

features.name: inout to wire workaround pattern
features.description: Code should include an inout signal assigned to an intermediate wire, which is then passed to a child module input as a workaround for signal propagation issues
